english_text: Everyone is equal before the law
The defendant's rights must be protected
This case is important to me
I think differently but that's okay
Let me try a different approach

korean_text: 제 이름은 앞으로 읽어도 뒤로 읽어도 우영우예요
romanization: je ireumeun apeuro ilgeodo dwiro ilgeodo uyeongwuyeyo

english_text: I need more time to investigate
Justice should be fair for everyone
Please listen to my closing argument
Don't worry I have a plan
The law is clear on this
I need to visit the scene
The statute of limitations has passed

korean_text: 모두 공정한 재판을 받을 권리가 있어요
romanization: modu gongjeonghan jaepaneul badeul gwolliga isseoyo

english_text: A small detail can change everything
korean_text: 작은 디테일이 모든 걸 바꿀 수 있어요
romanization: jageun diteiri modeun geol bakkul su isseoyo

english_text: I reviewed all the case files

romanization: jeongeui wihae ssaugetsseumnidaEvery case teaches me something
